raw_text:
Deposits | INECOBANK
Section: Deposits
[Product: Simple Deposit]
Invest in Inecobank's highly - profitable, fixed-rate "Simple" deposit. Make your dreams come true with us!
Tags: Longterm, Highest interest rate
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/deposits/simple
Apply URL: https://reg.inecobank.am/en
Image URL: https://www.inecobank.am/image/dA/fdf3462a-a/Inecobank_Deposit_Simple.jpg
[Product: Flexible Deposit]
If you want to invest in a deposit, however, you are not sure when the invested funds will be needed, we are introducing the "Flexible" deposit. Invest in Inecobank's "Flexible" deposit and withdraw it anytime, at the same time preserving the high yield.
Tags: Withdraw
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/deposits/flexible
Apply URL: https://reg.inecobank.am/en
Image URL: https://www.inecobank.am/image/dA/6bfff48a-0/Inecobank_Deposit_Flexible.jpg
[Product: Accumulative deposit]
Start realizing your big and distant goals and dreams with small steps. Make an Accumulative deposit and start saving even with small amounts. Replenishing and getting interest on it is more flexible than ever.
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/deposits/accumulative
Apply URL: https://reg.inecobank.am/en
Image URL: https://www.inecobank.am/image/dA/d9d14428-b/accumulative.png
[Product: "InecoSave" Savings account]
With "InecoSave" you can replenish and withdraw money from your savings account whenever you want, at the same time during withdrawal the accrued interest is preserved. It is easy to save with us!
Tags: Withdraw, Replenishable
Apply URL: https://reg.inecobank.am/en
Image URL: https://www.inecobank.am/image/dA/febfe2be-8/Inecobank_InecoSave.png

products.description: Invest in Inecobank's highly - profitable, fixed-rate "Simple" deposit. Make your dreams come true with us!

If you want to invest in a deposit, however, you are not sure when the invested funds will be needed, we are introducing the "Flexible" deposit. Invest in Inecobank's "Flexible" deposit and withdraw it anytime, at the same time preserving the high yield.

Start realizing your big and distant goals and dreams with small steps. Make an Accumulative deposit and start saving even with small amounts. Replenishing and getting interest on it is more flexible than ever.
With "InecoSave" you can replenish and withdraw money from your savings account whenever you want, at the same time during withdrawal the accrued interest is preserved. It is easy to save with us!
